name: SOC Response Playbook — Incident 91b076c5-eaba-4d65-a4f6-ba569d307750
description:
Okay, here’s an analysis of the security alert:

1.  **SUMMARY:** A lateral attack has been detected originating from a compromised workstation (192.168.1.35) targeting the SMB protocol.

2.  **TECHNIQUE:** T1059 - Command Execution – The attacker is attempting to execute a malicious command on the compromised system, potentially pivoting to other networks.

3.  **ACTION:** QUARANTINE_FILE – Immediately isolate the compromised workstation by disabling network access and potentially scanning for malware.

action--1.name: Alert Ingestion
action--1.description: System received new raw SIEM log
